description_long: This fence consists of a series of vertical wooden planks of varying heights arranged in a linear sequence, creating a visually dynamic silhouette. The planks are closely spaced, with no visible gaps between them, and each plank displays a rich, dark brown wood grain texture. The top edge of the fence forms an irregular, alternating pattern, as the heights of the planks differ from one to the next. There are no visible horizontal rails or connectors, giving the impression that the planks are either directly embedded into the ground or attached at the base. The surface of the wood appears slightly rough, with a matte finish that absorbs rather than reflects light. No decorative elements, post caps, or gates are present, making the design simple and utilitarian.
description: A linear fence made of vertical, dark brown wooden planks of varying heights, arranged closely together with a rough, matte finish and no decorative features.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full sequence of vertical wooden planks with their alternating heights and visible wood grain texture.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the extreme thinness of the planks, making the fence appear as a narrow line with no visible depth.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same alternating-height wooden planks and texture.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the thin profile of the fence, with no additional features visible.
